codeReview.summary: The feature intent is implemented: both HTTP and Tauri now gate snapshot loads on `version` before full v2 deserialization, legacy v1 returns the explicit unsupported-version bad-input message, and regression coverage was added in response-contract and Tauri command tests.

issues.description: The version probe is typed as `u8`, so payloads with `version` values above 255 produce a parse error instead of the unsupported-version bad-input path required for any version != 2. The same robustness gap exists in `src-tauri/src/main.rs:239`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The rust-worker skill's required final verification steps appear stricter than what workers are actually using, but handoffs can still mark `followedProcedure: true`, indicating procedure drift and possible confusion.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill requires `cd src-tauri && cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test` (`.factory/skills/rust-worker/SKILL.md:47-49`), while this handoff's final validation command only ran root clippy plus `cd src-tauri && cargo test` (`.../handoffs/2026-04-18T03-31-46-416Z__m6-fix-legacy-snapshot-version-message__b7b6e2c2-4a0e-490a-ae62-15f5e6b83618.json:36`) and still reports `followedProcedure: true` (line 67).

summary: Reviewed feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, rust-worker skill, and commit 65901a1 diff. The regression fix is present and contract tests were added for both transports, with one non-blocking robustness issue on version probe typing and one shared-state skill/procedure consistency observation.
